meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.7 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] 「X」は「□」囲み boxes the target run in a box glyph (□, U+25A1) — the box member of the 罫囲み enclosure family (EnclosureKind::Box). Particle は, single target X; the は and the quoted □ glyph live in the suffix. Per §7.5 it consumes the immediately preceding fullwidth literal 一 (Reclaimed shape) and yields an emphasis node; §8 reference rendering is … — the box is drawn by the stylesheet, so the □ glyph is not emitted. Serialization re-emits 「□」囲み byte-exact from the Box kind's canonical spelling. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.
